name: Ownerly

steps: Open the opt-out search page (link below) and search your name.
Select your record from the results.
Enter your email to receive a verification link.
Click the link in the verification email to confirm the removal.
The online form removes one record at a time; to remove more than one, email privacy@ownerly.com.

network.name: BeenVerified family (The Lifetime Value Co.)
network.note: These sites share one search engine and a privacy contact at The Lifetime Value Co.

notes: BeenVerified-family; primarily property/home-value, but its people-search listing can surface your name. Separate property-search opt-out exists. Covered persons (Daniel's Law) can email privacy@ownerly.com. Re-check periodically.
attribution: Derived from Big-Ass Data Broker Opt-Out List (CC BY-NC-SA); flow verified against the live opt-out page.
